Summary: Support Chatbot Core Build (Ask + Agent + Audit)
Description: Build the end-to-end STEP support chatbot: GitHub-sourced knowledge base, Ask-mode retrieval, Agent-mode confirmed writes, and full audit logging (Modules A-G).
Add L3-only agentic capabilities on top of the core chatbot: document read/update, in-chat answer correction, DB/CSV updates, GitHub file upload, and spec-to-code generation.

Summary: Build GitHub Connector & Ingestion Pipeline (Module B)
Description: As a system, I want to pull documents and tickets from the OmniBridge GitHub repo and chunk/index them so Ask mode can retrieve grounded answers.

Summary: Implement Ask-Mode Retrieval & Answer Synthesis (Module C)
Description: As an L2/L3 user, I want to ask a natural-language question and get a grounded, cited answer from the knowledge base rather than a fabricated one.

Summary: Implement L3 Access Gate & Session-Role Toggle
Description: As the system, I want L3-only capabilities to be unreachable from an L2 session, enforced via an X-Session-Role header check at the router level, with a visible UI toggle.

Summary: Build L3 File Upload via Chat Attachment
Description: As an L3 user, I want to attach a file in chat and have it committed to the GitHub repo with a confirmation and audit log entry, so new KT docs can be added without leaving the chatbot.

Summary: Excel ticket ingestion untested — no sample XLSX in repo
Description: The ingestion pipeline's Excel-chunking path (one row = one chunk) cannot be verified end-to-end because no sample ticket XLSX/CSV has been added to OmniBridgeDocs/tickets/ yet.

Summary: GitHub webhook delivery failure caused stale knowledge base
Description: Sev-3 incident: the ingestion webhook silently failed for ~6 hours on 2026-07-09, so two document updates pushed to the repo were not reflected in Ask-mode answers until the next full re-ingest. Resolved by adding a polling fallback per design decision D7.

Summary: Upgrade GitHub PAT scope to contents:write
Description: The current GitHub Personal Access Token is scoped to contents:read only. L3 capabilities 1 and 4 (document update, file upload) require contents:write. Requesting scope upgrade per Gap G1 in the L3 Agent Layer plan.
